title: Row Related Lists
overview: A Pipeline of #Data List Executables is configured to dynamically surface related data for any Opportunity. A #Data List that shows Opportunities is linked to the Pipeline via Q: Row Related Lists. Once configured, each row in the Opportunity data list automatically includes a row action that opens a pop-up with the related Data Lists defined in the Pipeline.
generalUseCase: Use Q: Row Related Lists to add dynamic, context-aware related lists to any #Data List—so each row can open a pop-up of configured Data Lists (via a Pipeline) for quick drill-in and action without leaving the current list.
